Director

Namhoon Kim

Assistant Professor, Department of Civil Engineering, Jeonbuk National University

Namhoon Kim is currently serving as an Assistant Professor in the Department of Civil Engineering at Jeonbuk National University. He possesses specialized expertise in geometric modeling for a variety of camera sensors, handling devices ranging from those situated on the surface to those operating in space. His research interests focus on generating high-quality digital twins of objects, and he conducts diverse studies in photogrammetry, pointcloudmetry, and computer vision.

Tel: +82-63-270-2430

E-mail: namhoon.kim@jbnu.ac.kr

Google Scholar ORCID LinkedIn

Academic Position

  • Assistant Professor, Jeonbuk National University (2026.3. - present)
  • Associate Professor, Korea Military Academy (2024.10. - 2026.2.)
  • Assistant Professor, Korea Military Academy (2021.8. - 2024.9.)
  • Research Professor, Gangneung-Wonju National University (2021.6. - 2021.7.)
  • Post-doctoral Researcher, Yonsei University (2021.3. - 2021.5.)

Professional Service

  • Advisory Committee Member, Jeonbuk Development Corporation (2026.6. - present)
  • Board Member, Korean Society of Surveying, Geodesy, Photogrammetry and Cartography (2026.1. - present)
  • Editor, Korean Society of Surveying, Geodesy, Photogrammetry and Cartography (2024.1. - present)
  • Laboratory Supervisor Professor, Department of Civil and Environmental Engineering, Korea Military Academy (2021.8. - 2025.2.)

Education

  • Ph.D. in Civil and Environmental Engineering, Yonsei University, 2012 - 2021
    Dissertation: Absolute Position/Orientation Estimation and Calibration Models without Initial Information for Smart City Sensors
  • B.S. in Civil and Environmental Engineering, Yonsei University, 2008 - 2012

Department of Civil Engineering, Jeonbuk National University

567, Baekje-daero, Deokjin-gu, Jeonju-si, Jeonbuk-do, Republic of Korea
